title: 🚀Introducing Timeline Manipulator: Automate your timeline!

posts.author: koko03_30 (Konstantin Botev)
posts.cookedHtml:
If you’ve ever wished for more flexibility with monday.com’s built-in automation when it comes to managing timelines, we have great news! Timeline Manipulator is here to give you the control you need. This powerful app allows you to automate timeline adjustments in ways that enhance your workflow and keep your projects on track.

Why Do You Need Timeline Manipulator?

Timelines are crucial for project management, but manually adjusting them every time something changes can be a hassle. With Timeline Manipulator, you can ensure that timelines automatically adjust based on triggers you define, reducing manual work and keeping your team aligned effortlessly.

What Can Timeline Manipulator Do?

With this app, you can automate timeline changes based on key actions. Here’s how it works:

When a status is changed, set the timeline to today and push it forward by a specific number of days. When a status changes to a specific value, automatically update the timeline and push it as needed. When a status changes from one specific value to another, adjust the timeline dynamically to reflect the update. When a person is assigned, set the timeline to today and push it forward, ensuring clarity on next steps. When a new item is created, instantly set the timeline to today and extend it based on your preset rules.

With these automation rules in place, you can maintain accurate project timelines without constantly making manual updates.

How Can This Improve Your Workflow?

  • Eliminate manual timeline adjustments – No more clicking around to update deadlines every time something changes.
  • Enhance project tracking – Keep everyone on the same page with up-to-date timelines that adjust automatically.
  • Boost productivity – Reduce time spent managing schedules and focus on what really matters.

Get Started Today!

Say goodbye to the frustration of manual timeline updates and unlock the full potential of your workflows. Try Timeline Manipulator now and experience the ease of automated timeline adjustments.

Check it out here!

Let us know how Timeline Manipulator helps your team—your feedback is invaluable!
